New colorway dropping soon — all three designs

Made layer by layer,
designed from scratch.

This is a Kearney FFA project. Every pot design was built in Onshape, 3D-printed in Sunlu PLA, and airbrushed with my logo on the bottom. No two prints are exactly the same.

Available in Bone White and Olive Green now — Terra Cotta coming soon. All pots have built-in drainage holes to keep your plants healthy.

*Plants not included.*

3D Printed in PLA

Durable Sunlu filament, printed to order.

Original Designs

Spike, Weave, Diamond — all modeled in Onshape from scratch.

Cork Coaster Included

Every pot comes with a 3D-printed coaster with cork top.

Drainage Holes

Built in to every design so roots stay healthy.

Pay via Venmo or Cash

Order online, pay in person or by Venmo request.
